calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-22-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Lois Jones.
Petitioner, Carol Ann Renselaer in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Carole Renselaer Moore.
Decree signed in open court.
